race.comment: PROXIMA CENTAURI (10) returned for her second prep with a respectable on-pace fifth over 1300m at Hawkesbury. Comes back a grade and expected to take a hand in the finish. MISS LEEWAY (8) is mixing her form and gets one more chance fifth-up from the inside gate. Went out hard and swamped late in the small field when fourth over 1500m at this track. Expected to go close. WHAT SHE'S HAVING (11) back from a lengthy break and can get off the mark quickly this time in. Stalked the speed at her second race start with a narrow second over 1600m at Nowra last December. Fitted with the two trials and can play a leading role. WHO I THINK I AM (12) just under a year off when she returned with a tiring last in the small field over 1200m at Gosford. Will appreciate the firmer track and improvement is anticipated at this level.
